questionHtml: The amplitude of oscillation is 0.12 m. On the axes, draw a graph to show the variation with time t of the velocity v of the ball during one period.
markschemeHtml:
sine graph

correct amplitude «0.13 m s–1»

correct period and only 1 period shown

 

Accept ± sine for shape of the graph. Accept 5.7 s or 6.0 s for the correct period.

Amplitude should be correct to ± 1 2  square for MP2

eg: v /m s–1   

[3 marks]

meta.title: The amplitude of oscillation is 0.12 m. On the axes, draw a graph to show the variation with time t of the velocity v of the ball during one period.
